headline: Apple’s New MacBook Is Cheaper Than an iPhone. Why That’s Such a Big Deal.
summary: Apple  has launched its most affordable laptop as memory costs surge and competitors raise prices.  The MacBook Neo, the company’s new laptop, is offered in four colors, including silver, a light pink, yellow, and blue.  The MacBook Neo comes with Apple’s A18 Pro chip and starts at $599.

headline: Apple Expands Mac Portfolio With New Devices: Can They Revive Growth?
summary: AAPL unveils MacBook Air and Pro with new M5 chips and AI gains as Mac sales slip and competition from Lenovo, HP and Dell intensifies.

headline: Morgan Stanley Lowers its Price Target on HP Inc. (HPQ) to $16 and Maintains an Underweight Rating
summary: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 25, 2026, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) to $16 from $18 and maintained an Underweight rating. The firm said fiscal Q1 earnings “played out largely as we expected,” noting that HP reduced EPS […]
